about.name: Mukesh Das
about.title: AI/ML Engineer
about.bio: Final year Computer Engineering student at Pune, Maharashtra, deeply passionate about building intelligent systems. Currently architecting a FastAPI-powered LLM backend using Mistral, while simultaneously building a custom LLM from scratch to understand the internals. My goal: leverage GPU-scale infrastructure to build production-grade, goal-oriented AI systems.

projects.title: FastAPI + Mistral LLM Backend
projects.description: Production-grade REST API backend integrating Mistral LLM with FastAPI. Features streaming responses, context management, and a modular router architecture. Foundation for a scalable AI product.

projects.title: Custom LLM from Scratch
projects.description: Building a transformer-based language model from first principles using PyTorch — custom tokenizer, multi-head attention, positional encoding, and training pipeline. Pure learning project to deeply understand LLM internals.

projects.title: Engineering Math AI Solver
projects.description: An AI-powered solver for Engineering Mathematics III problems (S.E. CS/IT/AI&ML curriculum). Uses symbolic computation and LLM explanation to walk through complex differential equations and transforms step by step.

projects.title: RAG Pipeline System
projects.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation system that ingests PDFs and engineering textbooks, chunks them semantically, embeds with sentence-transformers, stores in FAISS, and answers questions with Mistral.

projects.title: AI Portfolio (This Site)
projects.description: Fully animated portfolio powered by FastAPI backend, Three.js particle system, GSAP scroll animations, and a custom UI. Dynamic data served from API endpoints.

projects.title: Sentiment Analysis API
projects.description: Fine-tuned BERT model wrapped in a FastAPI microservice for real-time sentiment analysis. Includes batch processing, confidence scores, and a lightweight dashboard for monitoring.

timeline.title: B.E. Computer Engineering (AI & ML)
timeline.desc: Final year. Specialization in AI/ML. Coursework: Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Distributed Systems.

timeline.title: Started FastAPI × LLM Platform
timeline.desc: Architected and began building a production FastAPI backend with Mistral LLM integration — laying the foundation for a scalable AI product.

timeline.title: Built First End-to-End ML Pipeline
timeline.desc: Complete ML pipeline from data ingestion to model serving. Trained NLP models on custom datasets, deployed as REST APIs.

timeline.title: Discovered AI Engineering
timeline.desc: Deep dive into PyTorch, transformers, and the Hugging Face ecosystem. Completed Andrew Ng's Deep Learning Specialization.

timeline.title: Started B.E. Computer Engineering
timeline.desc: Began engineering studies with strong focus on programming fundamentals, data structures, and algorithms.
